title: Smoky Pork Skewers
description: A flavorful and juicy pork skewer recipe with a smoky twist, perfect for a summer barbecue.

ingredients.name: dehydrated onion, rehydrated in 2 tablespoons of water
skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes

instructions: Soak skewers in water for 30 minutes. Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together dehydrated onion, smoky paprika, german-style mustard, salt, and pepper.
Add pork cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread pork cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush olive oil onto the pork cubes.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the pork is cooked through.
Let skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
